items.title: [正面] давно хотела в неё поиграть и вроде как нет к ней...
items.summary: давно хотела в неё поиграть и вроде как нет к ней претензии, кроме того, как сюжет начинается так, что не понимаешь что вообще происходит из-за ключевых слов, что ты впервые слышишь в понимание этого мира, гачка очень красивая цепляющая практически всеми персонажами, я рада, что в моих глазах она не упала когда думала, что если игра платная, значит и донат будет душный, что оказался нет и вы можете выбить себе практически любого персонажа, если попотеть +5 персонажей за ээ пару дней это ваще имба советую рекомендую глаза радутся до сих пор

items.title: [负面] I don't know if it was a timing thing or not, but...
items.summary:
I don't know if it was a timing thing or not, but the lack of English voice acting just...really turned me off to this. Honestly I was skipping through the main story to try and get to the event to get the collab character. But when I got to the point that would let me do it apparently had to wait for their mission to be released still even though their event was already active. So I just stopped playing until it was available but by the time I came back and I asked myself if this was really a game I would be getting invested in. And the answer I came back with was no.

The story looks interesting. Its not a bad game. But the lack of English VAs just gives me no reason to bother with it. There are so many games that have no voice acting at all, and the struggle there is dealing with the reading. So if I'm going to be trying to play something that requires reading, it wouldn't be this game. Sorry.

I hope this game continues to do well, though. I enjoyed everything else about the game. It gets a thumbs down though because I think games released to global markets should put the effort and money into having voice actors for the global market.

items.title: [正面] I absolutely recommend this. If you are a fan of d...
items.summary: I absolutely recommend this. If you are a fan of deckbuilders, you will enjoy this game. Several of the characters have unique mechanics in so far as other deckbuilders are concerned, and the execution is solid. I encourage you to try this game.
